function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.window_farm_starter_tray
alias: window_farm_starter_tray
purchased_on: 2026-04-09
total_eur: 27
counterparty: Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien
project: Window Farm Notes
related_entity: Oskar Novak
lines:
  - item: self-watering tray
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 19
    line_eur: 19
  - item: herb seed packets
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---
# Herb tray and seed starter order

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                          |
| bill_id        | bill.window_farm_starter_tray |
| alias          | window_farm_starter_tray      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-04-09                    |
| total_eur      | 27                            |
| counterparty   | Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien       |
| project        | Window Farm Notes             |
| related_entity | Oskar Novak                   |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | self-watering tray | 1   | 19       | 19       |
| 2 | herb seed packets  | 1   | 8        | 8        |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL              |     |          | 27       |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Small child-friendly garden experiment that matters mostly because it might stick as a care routine.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read nested AGENTS.MD files before acting in each folder, used the inbox-processing, OCR, migration, and finance schema workflows, preserved the original note body, and deleted the inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` requested OCR of bills related to Oskar Novak. `10_entities/cast/oskar.md` canonically verified Oskar Novak. A search of `50_finance/purchases` found one related bill, and `50_finance/purchases/2026_04_09__eur_000027__bill__window_farm_starter_tray.md` contained all visible fields required by `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md`, so I added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving the source body, consistent with `99_system/workflows/ocr-records.md`, `99_system/workflows/migrate-records-to-frontmatter.md`, and `99_system/workflows/inbox-processing-v2-update.md`.
